creator: rakuco@FreeBSD.org
text: I've removed multimedia/qt5-multimedia/pkg-plist.svnpatch.rej from patch v2. As for the qt5-qml error, it looks like a problem with your `svn patch' call: `make patch' worked fine here, and from the error message and the fact that the log says 5.3.2_1 instead of 5.3.2 it appears qt5-qml/Makefile was not patched.
